MASTER JURY CALENDAR OF DEC-14-2020 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON DEC-14-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 505, JUDGE HAROLD E KAHN. MARRIANNE TALEGHANI, ESQ. APPEARING FOR CROSS-COMPLAINANT HENRY TANG, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS A TRUSTEE OF THE TANG-KELLOGG FAMILY TRUST VIA COURTCALL. JETHRO BUSCH, ESQ. AND STEPHANIE FOSTER, ESQ. APPEARING FOR CROSS-DEFENDANTS ASHAPURBA GHOSH AND NARASIMHA RAO VIA COURTCALL. ALL PARTIES HAVE STIPULATED TO HAVE THE MATTER TRIED AS BENCH TRIAL. THE COURT ALSO ASSIGNED A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE BEFORE THE HONORABLE CURTIS KARNOW IN DEPT. 611. PARTIES TO CONTACT DEPT. 611 VIA THE EMAIL ADDRESS PROVIDED TO THEM REGARDING SCHEDULING OF THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON 12/21/20 AND TO EMAIL THE TRIAL BRIEFS. IF THE CASE DOES NOT SETTLE, CASE IS ASSIGNED TO JUDGE KAHN FOR COURT TRIAL AND PARTIES ARE ALSO ORDERED TO EMAIL THE TRIAL BRIEFS VIA THE EMAIL PROVIDED TO PARTIES DURING TRIAL CALL. TIME ESTIMATE: 2 DAYS. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, CROSS-COMPLAINANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR. TWO DECLARATIONS SUPPORTING THIS MOTION WERE FILED AND SERVED (ELECTRONICALLY AND BY MAIL) ON APRIL 14, 2020, I.E. DID NOT PROVIDE FOR SUFFICIENT NOTICE (75 DAYS PLUS SERVICE). FURTHERMORE, DECLARATIONS FILED ON APRIL 14, 2020 INDICATE A HEARING DATE OF JUNE 11, 2020, WHICH WOULD PROVIDE EVEN SHORTER NOTICE THAN THE ACCURATE HEARING DATE OF JUNE 29, 2020. NO INDICATION ON FILE THAT OPPOSING PARTIES HAVE BEEN NOTIFIED OF JUNE 29, 2020 HEARING DATE. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion For Summary Adjudication Against Cross Defendants Narasimha Rao And Ashapurna Ghosh
Off Calendar Jun-29-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: Cross-Complainant's Motion for Summary Judgment is OFF CALENDAR. Two Declarations supporting this motion were filed and served (electronically and by mail) on April 14, 2020, i.e. did not provide for sufficient notice (75 days plus service). Furthermore, declarations filed on April 14, 2020 indicate a hearing date of June 11, 2020, which would provide even shorter notice than the accurate hearing date of June 29, 2020. No indication on file that opposing parties have been notified of June 29, 2020 hearing date. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
